info.name: Inkmark API
info.description:
Inkmark — social reading app. Clip articles, highlight text, follow others.

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header. Obtain a token by completing the Google OAuth flow at `GET /api/v1/auth/google`.

## Response Format
All responses use the `ApiResponse<T>` envelope:
- **Success**: `{ success: true, data: T, meta?: PaginationMeta }`
- **Error**: `{ success: false, error: { code: string, message: string } }`

## Variables
- `baseUrl` — API base (default: `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`)
- `token` — JWT; set automatically after OAuth or paste manually
- `clipId`, `highlightId`, `tagId`, `userId`, `username` — auto-populated by test scripts on create/fetch calls

item.name: Health
item.description: Server health check — no auth required.

request.description: Returns 200 if the server is running. Mounted outside `/api/v1/` so load balancers can reach it without auth.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Google OAuth 2.0 authentication and user session management.

request.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen. **Open in a browser** — not a JSON endpoint.

query.description: Set automatically by the OAuth redirect — do not call manually

request.description: Handles the Google OAuth callback. Upserts the user and redirects to `CLIENT_REDIRECT_URL?token=<JWT>`. Do not call manually.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.

Updates the authenticated user's profile. All fields are optional — only include what you want to change.

- `username`: 3–30 chars, lowercase letters, numbers, underscores only. Unique — 409 if taken.
- `displayName`: 1–100 chars
- `bio`: max 500 chars

response.name: 400 — Validation Error

request.description: Stateless logout — returns 204 and the client drops the token.

item.name: Clips
item.description: CRUD for clips (saved articles/URLs). Tag management and nested highlights are sub-resources.

body.raw:
{
  "url": "https://example.com/article",
  "title": "Interesting Article",
  "description": "A deep dive into something fascinating",
  "ogImage": "https://example.com/og.jpg",
  "faviconUrl": "https://example.com/favicon.ico",
  "isPublic": true,
  "tags": ["reading", "tech"]
}

request.description:
Creates a new clip. Auto-sets `{{clipId}}` on success.

**Required**: `url` (valid URL)
**Optional**: `title` (1–500), `description` (max 1000), `ogImage` (URL), `faviconUrl` (URL), `isPublic` (default: true), `tags` (array of strings, each 1–50 chars)

response.name: 201 — Created

request.description: Returns the authenticated user's clips, paginated. All query parameters are optional.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Returns a single clip. Users can view their own clips or any public clip from another user.

response.name: 200 — Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "clx1clip1234abcd",
    "userId": "clx1abc123def456",
    "url": "https://example.com/article",
    "domain": "example.com",
    "title": "Interesting Article",
    "description": null,
    "ogImage": null,
    "faviconUrl": null,
    "isPublic": true,
    "savedAt": "2025-01-15T12:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T12:00:00.000Z",
    "tags": []
  }
}

request.description:
Partially updates a clip. Owner only.

**Optional**: `title` (min 1), `isPublic` (boolean)

response.name: 200 — Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "clx1clip1234abcd",
    "userId": "clx1abc123def456",
    "url": "https://example.com/article",
    "domain": "example.com",
    "title": "Updated Title",
    "description": null,
    "ogImage": null,
    "faviconUrl": null,
    "isPublic": false,
    "savedAt": "2025-01-15T12:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T12:30:00.000Z",
    "tags": []
  }
}

request.description: Soft-deletes a clip (sets `deletedAt`). Owner only.

Adds a tag to a clip. Creates the tag if it doesn't exist (upsert). Names are lowercased and trimmed. Auto-sets `{{tagId}}`.

**Required**: `name` (1–50 chars)
Removes a tag from a clip. Does not delete the tag itself — only the association.

Returns all highlights on a clip, ordered by `createdAt` ascending.

- **Public clip**: any authenticated user can view
- **Private clip**: owner only

response.name: 200 — Success

item.name: Highlights
item.description: Create, update, and soft-delete highlights anchored to clips.

body.raw:
{
  "clipId": "{{clipId}}",
  "text": "This is a highlighted passage from the article.",
  "contextBefore": "The author wrote: ",
  "contextAfter": " which was insightful.",
  "color": "yellow"
}

request.description:
Creates a highlight. DB FK constraint validates `clipId` exists — invalid ID returns 400. Auto-sets `{{highlightId}}`.

**Required**: `clipId`, `text` (1–5000)
**Optional**: `contextBefore` (max 200), `contextAfter` (max 200), `color` (yellow|green|blue|pink, default: yellow)

response.name: 201 — Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "clx1hl001",
    "clipId": "clx1clip1234abcd",
    "userId": "clx1abc123def456",
    "text": "This is a highlighted passage.",
    "contextBefore": null,
    "contextAfter": null,
    "color": "yellow",
    "createdAt": "2025-01-15T13:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T13:00:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description:
Partially updates a highlight. Owner only.

**Optional**: `color` (yellow|green|blue|pink), `text` (1–5000)

response.name: 200 — Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "clx1hl001",
    "clipId": "clx1clip1234abcd",
    "userId": "clx1abc123def456",
    "text": "This is a highlighted passage.",
    "contextBefore": null,
    "contextAfter": null,
    "color": "green",
    "createdAt": "2025-01-15T13:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T13:30:00.000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Soft-deletes a highlight (sets `deletedAt`). Owner only.

item.name: Follows
item.description: Follow and unfollow users; view follower and following lists.

request.description:
Follow a user.

- Self-follow → 400 (`CANNOT_FOLLOW_SELF`)
- Already following → 409 (`CONFLICT`)
Unfollow a user. Returns 404 if not currently following.
Returns paginated list of users following `userId`, ordered by most recent first.
Returns paginated list of users that `userId` is following, ordered by most recent first.

item.name: Feed
item.description: Paginated clips and highlights from followed users. Only returns public content.

request.description: Returns paginated public clips from followed users, ordered by `savedAt` descending. Empty if you follow nobody.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Returns paginated highlights on public clips from followed users, ordered by `createdAt` descending.

response.name: 200 — Success

item.name: Users
item.description: Public user profiles, user clips/highlights, and user search.

query.description: Search by username or display name (case-insensitive). Max 20 results.

request.description:
Case-insensitive search across `username` and `displayName`. Returns up to 20 results.

**Required**: `q` (min 1 char)
Returns a user's profile by username. Auto-sets `{{userId}}` and `{{username}}`.
Returns a user's public clips (`isPublic: true`), paginated.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: Returns highlights on a user's public clips, paginated.

response.name: 200 — Success

item.name: Search
item.description: Full-text search across the authenticated user's clips and highlights.

request.description:
Search the authenticated user's own content.

- **`type=clips`**: Full-text search using PostgreSQL `tsvector` + `ts_rank` (ranked by relevance)
- **`type=highlights`**: Case-insensitive text search on highlight content
- **`type=all`**: Both, returned as `{ clips: [...], highlights: [...] }` (no per-type pagination meta)

**Required**: `q`
**Optional**: `type` (default: all), `page`, `limit`, `from`, `to`

response.name: 200 — type=clips
200 — type=highlights
200 — type=all
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "clips": [
      {
        "id": "clx1clip1234abcd",
        "url": "https://example.com/js-guide",
        "title": "JavaScript Guide",
        "domain": "example.com",
        "isPublic": true,
        "savedAt": "2025-01-15T12:00:00.000Z",
        "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T12:00:00.000Z",
        "userId": "clx1abc123def456",
        "description": null,
        "ogImage": null,
        "faviconUrl": null,
        "tags": []
      }
    ],
    "highlights": [
      {
        "id": "clx1hl001",
        "text": "Closures are a fundamental concept in JavaScript.",
        "color": "yellow",
        "clipId": "clx1clip1234abcd",
        "userId": "clx1abc123def456",
        "contextBefore": null,
        "contextAfter": null,
        "createdAt": "2025-01-15T13:00:00.000Z",
        "updatedAt": "2025-01-15T13:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}
